---
---

## Slide 1 - mermaid

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A --> B
```

## Slide 2 - dot (graphviz)

```{dot}
digraph G {
  a -> b
}
```

## Slide 3 - Multiple diagrams

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A --> B
```

```{dot}
digraph G { x -> y }
```

## Slide 4 - named mermaid

```{mermaid}
%%| label: mychart
flowchart LR
  X --> Y
```
